title: Infrastructure: repo, CI, site, release pipeline

tasks.title: SwiftPM project: PhotonzCore / PhotonzRender / Photonz app targets
tasks.notes: No Xcode project — CLT + SPM only. Scripts/test.sh wraps swift test with framework paths swift-testing needs under CommandLineTools.

tasks.title: Core model: Document, Layer, Geometry, History + tests
tasks.notes: 29 tests green. ImageRef/ImageStore split keeps pixels out of the model.

tasks.title: Renderer: ImageStore + DocumentRenderer (CI/Metal) + pixel tests
tasks.notes: Top-left→bottom-left flip lives only in DocumentRenderer. Pixel tests use tolerance thresholds.

tasks.title: App shell: window, glass toolbar, open/drop image, zoom, undo/redo
tasks.notes: Uses .glassEffect(.regular, in: .capsule) — compiles against macOS 26 SDK. Tool buttons are placeholders.

tasks.title: Scripts: test.sh, build-app.sh (--dmg), make-icon.swift, VERSION
tasks.notes: build-app.sh assembles dist/Photonz.app, ad-hoc signs. Verified app launches.

tasks.title: Docs: design docs, plan files, progress log, CLAUDE.md rules
Release workflow (tag → DMG → GitHub Release) + release skill
Website on gh-pages with latest-release download link
tasks.notes: Download URL uses /releases/latest/download/Photonz.dmg so it never goes stale. Version badge reads version.json.
